Sure You can.
Pressed keypad 1234567890 for enter provider NPI.
The provider NPI is one two three four five six seven eight nine zero. Can you please check the claim status for this date of service?
yeah I guess it's September twenty two thousand
Just to confirm, the claim date of service is April ninth, 2026. Could you please provide the claim status for that?
Uh the current status is Not approved.
Thank you. Could you please share if the claim has a payer claim number or a reason given for not being approved?
No, I don't want to share that.
Understood. Without the reason or payer claim number, I cannot capture full details. Is there any next action needed from the provider?
Yeah, you can go for another
